channel.title: ProudTek RFID Blog
channel.description: RFID buying guides, technology comparisons, and application insights from ProudTek — an RFID card, tag, and label manufacturer since 2008.

item.title: About RFID and 7 Types of Regular RFID Tags
item.description: Learn about RFID technology and discover 7 types of regular RFID tags including passive tags, active tags, semi-passive tags, and more. Complete guide from ProudTek.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: MIFARE Chip Card Guide: Classic, Plus, DESFire and Ultralight Compared
item.description: Compare NXP MIFARE chip cards: Classic 1K/4K, Plus, DESFire EV2/EV3, Ultralight. Security, memory, cost and application guide from ProudTek manufacturer.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Choosing the Right RFID Frequency for Your Application
item.description: Guide to RFID frequencies: LF (125kHz), HF (13.56MHz), UHF (860-960MHz). Compare read ranges, applications, and choose the right RFID frequency. ProudTek expert guide.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: HF vs UHF RFID: How to Choose the Right Frequency for Your Project
item.description: HF vs UHF RFID comparison: read range, chip options, standards, cost and use cases. Choose the right RFID frequency for cards, tags and labels. ProudTek guide.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID for Retail Inventory: How Stores Use UHF Tags to Cut Stockouts
item.description: Retail RFID inventory guide: how UHF tags improve stock accuracy to 95%+, reduce out-of-stocks and automate store replenishment. ProudTek label solutions.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID Access Control Cards: A Buyer's Guide to Building and Campus Security
item.description: RFID access control card buying guide: chip selection, credential formats, encoding options and supplier checklist for buildings, offices and campuses. ProudTek guide.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Digital Product Passport with NFC and RFID: What Brands Should Build Before EU DPP Deadlines
item.description: Compare QR, NFC and RFID for Digital Product Passport projects. Learn when GS1 Digital Link is enough and when serialized tags make sense.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: NFC Anti-Counterfeit Tags: How Brands Use Secure Authentication Labels in 2026
item.description: Compare secure NFC chips, tamper options and authentication flows for anti-counterfeit labels and smartphone-based product verification.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID Baggage Tracking for Airlines and Airports: What Buyers Should Compare in 2026
item.description: Learn how airports and airlines use RFID baggage tags, reader checkpoints and Resolution 753 workflows to improve bag visibility and transfer accuracy.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID for Fresh Food Retail: How Grocery Teams Extend Item-Level Visibility into Bakery, Meat and Deli
item.description: See how grocers are testing RFID in bakery, meat and deli. Compare label choices, cold-chain risks and pilot design for fresh-food tracking.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: QR vs NFC vs RFID for Digital Product Passport: Which Carrier Should Brands Choose?
item.description: Compare QR, NFC and RFID for Digital Product Passport programs. See when one carrier is enough and when brands should combine all three.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Medical Device RFID and UDI: What Manufacturers Should Compare for Tracking and Compliance
item.description: Understand how FDA UDI rules affect labels, direct marking and tracking, and where RFID adds value in reusable devices, trays and hospital workflows.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID for Returns and Reverse Logistics: How Retailers Turn Post-Sale Chaos into Recoverable Value
item.description: Learn how RFID improves returns intake, routing, resale and reverse logistics visibility for retailers handling high volumes and value recovery.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Battery Passport with RFID and NFC: What EV and Industrial Battery Teams Should Plan Now
item.description: Compare QR, NFC and RFID for battery passport programs across manufacturing, service, second life and recycling workflows.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Sunrise 2027 and RFID: Why 2D Barcodes Will Not Replace Item-Level RFID in Retail
item.description: Understand what GS1 Sunrise 2027 changes at POS, where 2D barcodes help, and why retailers still need item-level RFID for operations.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: FSMA 204 and RFID: What Food Traceability Teams Should Pilot Before July 20, 2028
item.description: Learn what FSMA 204 requires, why July 20, 2028 matters, and where RFID can support receiving, cold-chain visibility and food traceability data capture.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: DSCSA and RFID: Where RFID Fits in Pharmaceutical Traceability Beyond Package-Level Serialization
item.description: See where RFID fits around DSCSA package-level tracing, from warehouse handling to case and pallet visibility in pharmaceutical supply chains.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Textile DPP with QR, NFC and RFID: What Apparel Brands Should Put on the Garment, Hangtag or Packaging
item.description: Compare QR, NFC and RFID for textile Digital Product Passport programs and decide what belongs on the garment, hangtag or packaging.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Hotel Key Card RFID Guide: Chips, Materials and OEM Questions Buyers Should Compare
item.description: Hotel RFID key card buying guide covering chip options, card materials, print finishes, encoding questions and sample planning for hospitality projects.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Laundry RFID Tags Buying Guide: How to Choose Washable Tags for Linen and Uniform Tracking
item.description: Laundry RFID tag buying guide for linen and uniform tracking. Compare silicone, PPS and textile laundry tags, attachment methods and wash-cycle requirements.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Anti-Metal RFID Tags Guide: How to Track Tools, IT Assets and Equipment on Metal Surfaces
item.description: Anti-metal RFID tag guide for tools, IT assets and industrial equipment. Compare printable on-metal labels, hard tags, high-temperature tags and compact PCB or ceramic formats.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID Labels vs Hard Tags: Which Format Fits Your Tracking Project?
item.description: RFID labels vs hard tags guide comparing durability, surface fit, printability, reuse and project economics for warehouse, retail and industrial tracking.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID Wristbands for Events and Hotels: What Buyers Should Compare Before Ordering
item.description: RFID wristband buying guide for events and hotels. Compare silicone, fabric and disposable bands for access control, cashless payment and guest identification.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: How to Choose RFID Readers and Writers for Encoding, Testing and Deployment
item.description: How to choose RFID readers and writers for cards, tags and labels. Compare desktop, USB, fixed and embedded readers plus software, interface and protocol requirements.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID Keyfob Buying Guide: How to Match Access Credentials to Existing Readers
item.description: RFID keyfob buying guide for access control, parking and membership projects. Compare ABS, epoxy and NFC keyfobs and match them to existing readers.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: NFC Tags for Business: 10 Powerful Use Cases in 2026
item.description: Top 10 NFC tag business applications in 2026: smart packaging, digital business cards, product authentication, customer engagement. NFC solutions from ProudTek.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: Mifare Classic vs DESFire: Which RFID Chip Should You Choose?
item.description: Mifare Classic vs DESFire EV3: compare security levels, memory capacity, encryption standards, pricing, and best applications. Expert buying guide from ProudTek RFID manufacturer.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: RFID vs Barcode: A Complete Comparison for Businesses
item.description: RFID vs Barcode comparison: speed, accuracy, cost, ROI analysis. Learn when to use RFID tags vs barcodes for inventory management, retail, and supply chain. ProudTek guide.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)

item.title: How to Order Custom RFID Cards from China: Complete Buyer's Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to ordering custom RFID cards from China: how to choose a manufacturer, specify requirements, negotiate pricing, ensure quality, and arrange shipping.
item.author: info@proudtek.com (ProudTek Editorial Team)
